evals.prompt: Build an interactive HTML prototype for the new onboarding flow. Use the existing design system tokens. I want at least three layout variations and a dark mode toggle.
evals.expected_output: Router reads tracked-work.json, finds no active sprint, routes design-context-scout to produce context.md from the codebase design tokens, then routes design-proposer which writes sprint_proposal.md with the output type set to html-prototype, variation axes for layout and dark mode, and AC-001 through AC-008 plus output-type criteria. Phase parks at awaiting_human.

evals.prompt: Write up the design system documentation for our color tokens and spacing scale.
evals.expected_output: This is documentation writing, not artifact production. The frontend-design family does not own documentation writing. The router should return 'No family child fits' and defer to a documentation or writing workflow.

evals.prompt: Check whether the new dashboard page looks right in mobile view and test all the interactive states.
evals.expected_output: This is functional QA of an existing page, not design artifact production. The router should return 'No family child fits' and defer to frontend-qa or similar.

evals.prompt: The design reviewer flagged the prototype as FAIL — the Tweaks panel listener was registered after __edit_mode_available was posted. Fix it and resubmit.
evals.expected_output: Router reads status.json which shows phase: reviewed_fail with a valid clean_restore_ref and attempt_count < max_attempts. Routes design-builder for a retry. Builder restores from clean_restore_ref, increments attempt_count, fixes the listener registration order, and produces a new handoff.md.

evals.prompt: I need a pitch deck for the Q3 investor update. It should have our brand colors, 8 slides covering traction, product roadmap, and team. Also make sure it works as a PDF export and add some nice animations if you can. Oh and can you also update the README with the new metrics?
evals.expected_output: Router identifies slide-deck as the output type. README update is out of scope for the design family — the router should either ignore it or surface it as a separate task. Routes design-context-scout to gather brand tokens, then design-proposer scopes the sprint to the 8 slides with explicit sections, noting that PDF export and animations are out of scope unless included in the approved contract. README update is deferred.
